role: AI Solutions Engineer – Agentic & Multi-Agent Systems
headerTitle: AI Solutions Engineer  ·  Agentic Systems  ·  Client Implementation  ·  Python · TypeScript  ·  Claude Daily
subjectText: AI Solutions Engineer — Marco Technologies (Remote, TX) · $110K–$176K — Will Austin
intro: Marco Technologies is looking for someone who has built and deployed agentic AI systems against real client environments — not in a sandbox, not as a proof of concept, but as production systems the client depends on daily. That is the operating model across four external client engagements and 14 live AI endpoints: memory, tools, orchestration, and the guardrail patterns that keep agents behaving correctly when the workflow gets complex. The bridge between emerging AI capability and real-world implementation is where this work lives.
bullets: Agentic systems with memory, tools, and orchestration — 14 live endpoints using MCP protocol, tool-use architecture, HITL confirm-before-execute, multi-step reasoning chains, and Zod-validated structured output. Memory strategies implemented per system: short-term context management, long-term state persistence, and cross-session retrieval. Every system is designed to fail loudly and recover gracefully — not to hallucinate silently.

Client implementation and technical stakeholder delivery — four complete external engagements from discovery through production handoff: roofing, home services, auto repair, OOH advertising. Each started with translating a business workflow into an AI architecture spec the client could review and approve. Each ended with a deployed system the client ran without technical support. Comfortable presenting AI system design to non-technical operators and executive stakeholders.

Production API development and system integration — 100+ REST API routes in production across Next.js 15 App Router and Node.js backends, Python data pipelines processing 1.4M+ property records, BullMQ + Redis job queues for async AI orchestration, Stripe Connect webhooks, Twilio and Sinch SMS integration, IMAP email parsing, and Google OAuth2. Integration is not a step at the end — it is designed into the architecture from the start.

Python + TypeScript across the full AI stack — Python for data pipelines, batch AI processing, and agent orchestration; TypeScript for full-stack application delivery. Multi-model routing (Claude + GPT-4o) with per-request observability, prompt caching, and cost-optimized model selection by operation type. Responsible AI practices: structured output contracts, governance through Zod validation, and HITL guardrails on every destructive operation.
closingLine: The combination Marco Technologies is hiring for — production agentic system design, client implementation experience, Python and TypeScript fluency, and the ability to translate AI capability into business outcomes that stakeholders can understand and trust — is the current operating model. I would welcome a conversation about where the Digital Employee and managed AI service roadmap is headed.
matchNotes: Strong: agentic systems (memory/tools/orchestration = exact JD language), 14 production endpoints, 4 client implementations, stakeholder translation, Python + API production, TX eligible. Gaps: CS degree required (self-taught), no cloud certs, managed services context new. $110-176K range solid.
